title: Resource Allocation and Focus
shortSummary: How to decide where time, talent, and money should go when everything seems important and capacity is limited.
whyItMatters: Strategy becomes real when resources move. If your budget, headcount, and founder time are spread too thin, even a smart strategy collapses into noise.
coreConcepts: Resource allocation is the operating expression of strategy
Every priority creates an opportunity cost elsewhere in the business
Focus improves speed and quality because fewer initiatives compete for the same capacity
Great strategy includes a clear stop-doing list, not just a wish list of initiatives
